# License {#sec-chapter-license}

::: {.callout-warning}
## Placeholder

Open Game License or Creative Commons statement. Product Identity declaration. Open Game Content declaration. Third-party attributions (fonts, art).
:::

---

## Open Game License Version 1.0a

::: {.callout-warning}
## Placeholder

Full OGL 1.0a text or custom license to be added in Issue #95.
:::
